hero.title: The iCane That Sees Ahead.
hero.subtitle: SmartCane: Redefining Mobility with AI-Powered Safety.
hero.description: iCane uses advanced sensor technology and AI to detect obstacles, analyze terrain, and guide you with real-time feedback. Gain confidence and independence with a device built for your journey.
hero.imageAlt: Group of people walking with canes

about.paragraph1: At iCane, we believe technology should make life easier for everyone. Our smart cane is designed to help people with visual impairments move safely and confidently every day.
about.paragraph2: The iCane uses smart sensors and simple feedback to guide users and prevent obstacles. It is built to be reliable, easy to use, and supportive of greater independence.
about.paragraph3: Our team is passionate about creating tools that truly make a difference. We listen to our users, learn from their experiences, and keep improving to make iCane even better.

items.question: What is SmartCane?
items.answer: SmartCane (iCane) is an intelligent walking cane for visually impaired individuals. It combines IoT technology, AI-based object detection, and navigation tools to support safer and more independent travel.

items.question: How do I create an account and log in?
items.answer: Visit the SmartCane website and click Sign Up. Enter your details, create your account, then log in using your email and password to access your dashboard.

items.question: How do I use the SmartCane website?
items.answer: After logging in, you can manage your profile, monitor device status, review notifications, use navigation tools, and manage guardians and VIP connections.

items.question: How do guardians and VIP users work?
items.answer: Guardians are trusted contacts who can monitor and assist VIP users. Once connected, guardians can receive alerts, monitor location, and provide help when needed.

items.question: What safety features does SmartCane provide?
items.answer: SmartCane provides obstacle detection, voice or vibration alerts, GPS tracking, and emergency SOS notifications to improve safety during movement.

items.question: How do I charge and maintain SmartCane?
items.answer: Use a USB cable to charge the cane. A full charge usually takes around 2 to 3 hours. The device is water-resistant for light rain but should not be submerged.

contact.description: Whether you have questions, need support, or want to share your experience, our team is ready to assist.
contact.callDescription: We are just a call away for any questions or support you need.
contact.emailDescription: Send us an email and we will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.description: A smart mobility cane empowering the visually impaired with safety, guidance, and connectivity.

Visual-Recognition.title: AI-Based Visual Recognition
Visual-Recognition.description: Through AI-powered visual recognition, the Smart Cane identifies objects and surroundings, giving users instant audio descriptions that enhance awareness and support safer decision-making during travel.

route-navigation.title: Route Navigation
route-navigation.description: The Smart Cane's route navigation feature provides guided directions through real-time voice prompts, helping users move confidently and safely toward their destination without relying solely on tactile cues.

gps.title: GPS
gps.description: With real-time GPS tracking, guardians can easily monitor the user's location through the connected web app, ensuring safety and peace of mind wherever they go.

emergency-sos.title: SOS
emergency-sos.description: During emergencies, iCane automatically sends an SOS alert with the user's exact location to registered guardians, enabling quick response and immediate assistance.

iot-connectivity.title: IOT Connectivity
iot-connectivity.description: iCane's IoT integration links the device to a companion web application that provides connectivity, fall detection, emergency alerts, and user location for continuous monitoring.

weather.title: Weather Notifications
weather.description: Stay one step ahead of the weather. iCane delivers instant weather alerts to help users prepare for outdoor conditions and ensure safer navigation.

document.title: Shared Notes & Reminders
document.description: Through the shared notes feature, guardians can send text messages that iCane reads aloud via its AI assistant, keeping users informed, reminded, and connected anytime.

voiceGuidedNavigation.label: Voice-Guided Navigation
voiceGuidedNavigation.headline: Navigate with Confidence
voiceGuidedNavigation.sub: Real-time obstacle detection keeps every step safe.

alwaysConnected.label: Always Connected
alwaysConnected.headline: Peace of Mind, Everywhere
alwaysConnected.sub: Live GPS tracking so guardians are never out of the loop.

emergencyReady.label: Emergency Ready
emergencyReady.headline: SOS at Your Fingertips
emergencyReady.sub: Instant alerts sent to your guardians when it matters most.

smartAssistiveTech.label: Smart Assistive Tech
smartAssistiveTech.headline: Smart. Safe. Independent.
smartAssistiveTech.sub: The future of assistive mobility is finally here.

team.subtitle: Passionate experts dedicated to redefining mobility through innovative technology and inclusive design.

1.bio: Leads iCane's product experience from concept to prototype, translating user needs into accessible, intuitive interfaces and consistent design systems.

2.bio: Leads research and documentation for iCane, consolidating technical findings into clear reports, diagrams, and annotated visuals to support development and evaluation.

3.bio: Builds iCane's web UI with a focus on clean components, responsive layouts, and smooth user interactions for both users and guardians.

4.bio: Supports product planning and documentation by coordinating requirements, keeping progress aligned, and ensuring deliverables are clearly written and well-structured.

5.bio: Bridges software and hardware by developing web features while helping integrate sensors and device components for reliable end-to-end functionality.

6.role: Full Stack Web Developer & Visually Impaired User
6.bio: Develops full-stack features while providing direct user perspective, helping validate flows, feedback, and accessibility decisions from real-world usage.

7.bio: Designs layouts and presentation materials for iCane, ensuring screens, reports, and visuals communicate information clearly and consistently.

8.bio: Supports iCane research and testing, documenting experiments, results, and implementation notes to keep the team aligned and the project reproducible.

9.bio: Leads planning and quality assurance for iCane, organizing tasks, tracking progress, and verifying features through structured testing and validation.

10.bio: Creates iCane's visual assets and UI polish, combining branding, graphic design, and interface design to produce a cohesive look and feel.

11.bio: Coordinates documentation and research tasks, keeping project notes organized and ensuring outputs are clear, consistent, and ready for submission.

12.bio: Assists in research and documentation, translating technical work into understandable write-ups and maintaining clear records of implementation decisions.

13.bio: Writes and edits iCane's technical content, ensuring the paper, captions, and documentation are readable, consistent, and properly structured.

14.bio: Leads system architecture and implementation, bringing components together into a reliable, secure, and scalable real-time solution.
